elements.original_description: A person standing with a confused expression, scratching their head, symbolizing uncertainty or lack of knowledge.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person standing with a visibly confused facial expression, scratching their head, depicting a moment of deep thought or uncertainty. The scene should have soft, cinematic lighting with sharp focus on the subject against a neutral background, conveying a sense of confusion and lack of knowledge.

elements.original_description: A stack of bills and a red 'Due' stamp on a white background, representing financial debt.
elements.image_prompt: High-resolution professional 2D minimalist icon of a neat stack of paper bills with a bold red 'Due' stamp prominently overlayed, placed on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art with high contrast, sharp edges, and absolutely no shading or gradients, symbolizing financial debt with clarity and simplicity.

elements.original_description: A graphic of a rising stock market chart with a dollar sign, symbolizing investment growth.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a simplified, rising stock market line graph with a dollar sign integrated into the design, on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art with high contrast and no shading or gradients, conveying the concept of investment growth in a clear, modern, and graphical style.
